purpose: A visual representation of a person, product, or object. Supports initials, icon, photo, or custom image.
whenToUse: Display user identity in ShellBar, comments, lists
Compact visual representation when name alone is insufficient
whenNotToUse: For complex data display — use Card or Tile
doRules: Always use square for products, circle for people
Show initials when no photo available
Use consistent size within a context (XS/S/M/L/XL)
Pair with name or accessible label
dontRules: Do not use circle for product/object avatars
Do not stretch image to non-square ratios
Do not omit aria-label for icon-only avatars

contentRules: Initials are first letter of first + last name

accessibilityGuidance.requirement: Tooltip or aria-label describes the avatar subject

exceptions: Group avatars (avatar stack) for showing multiple users
